did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a data article describing the PAD-UFES-20 dataset and does not use AI to obtain its own results. It mentions that the dataset can be used for training machine learning methods and cites a separate study (Pacheco and Krohling, 2020) that used deep learning models, but the current paper itself focuses on data collection, quality control, and dataset description rather than performing AI-based analysis.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
